name: JBL
philosophy: JBL's web presence is the bright-lifestyle-audio brand — JBL Orange (#ff5500) as the chromatic voltage, action-lifestyle photography (parties, outdoor adventures, gym workouts), and a dark canvas (#0d0d0d) anchoring the chrome. The atmosphere is high-energy consumer audio: youth-oriented, color-rich, and unapologetically loud where Bose and Sonos are quiet.

design_language.motion_signature: High-energy motion — auto-playing lifestyle video heroes, carousel transitions at 400–600ms, hover lift on cards (1.04 scale). Speaker visualizations on product pages animate sound-wave rings outward from the speaker on idle.

trademark_signals: JBL Orange (#ff5500) — chromatic voltage on CTAs, wordmark accent, sound-wave animations
Dark canvas (#0d0d0d) — youth-oriented audio brand backdrop
Action-lifestyle photography — parties, outdoor adventures, gym workouts
Sound-wave ring animations on speaker product pages
Pill-shaped CTAs in JBL Orange — high-energy primary action
ai_slop_avoided: Don't tint the JBL Orange — the specific saturated #ff5500 is brand
Don't replace dark canvas with white — youth-energy chrome lives on dark
Don't sanitize the lifestyle photography to clinical product-on-white — the action context is the brand
Don't remove the sound-wave ring animations — they are the brand's auditory-visual signature
